name: GaugeFlow Gate A4 generator substrate v1
objective: Audit the probability path, atom-type manifold, decoder, flow target, and joint generator substrate after Gate A3's decoded-state failure. This is not a tensor-conditioning method experiment.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: Do not modify any historical threshold, checkpoint, report, split, or failure status.

endpoint_id_substrate.condition: two-class one-hot endpoint ID only; no piezo/tensor input, orbit, oracle, target-CIF condition, or target symmetry is supplied to the model

decision_rules.analytic_path_failure: repair path/sampler and stop all neural training
decision_rules.endpoint_id_type_failure: replace atom-type manifold or decoder before any tensor-conditioned experiment
decision_rules.endpoint_id_geometry_failure: repair periodic-coordinate or lattice path before any tensor-conditioned experiment
decision_rules.endpoint_id_joint_only_failure: audit multi-head scale or joint backbone before any tensor-conditioned experiment
decision_rules.endpoint_id_joint_pass: only then may a separately versioned tensor-conditioned gate be proposed
